data.title: Kodiak Gas Services (NYSE: KGS) offers 2024 tax packages for CSI Compressco LP online for former unitholders.
data.description: Today, Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. (NYSE: KGS) released the 2024 Schedule K-3 investor tax documents pertaining to former CSI Compressco LP unitholders. These documents contain important international tax information. The tax packages are accessible online through the K-1 Tax Package Support website at www.taxpackagesupport.com/compressco. Kodiak acquired CSI Compressco on April 1.

data.title: Koch Equity Development buys GCH Technologies Inc. to boost wireless innovation. Acquisition made on Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: Koch Equity Development LLC (KED), the investment arm of Koch, Inc., revealed on August 22, 2025, its acquisition aimed to enhance solutions for the messaging ecosystem and boost wireless innovation in Wichita, Kansas. This move will aid GCH in speeding up its services while driving new developments in the wireless sector. This strategic acquisition comes as part of KED's efforts to expand its portfolio and ensure growth in the tech industry.

data.title: Elite Express Holding Inc. closed $15.2 million IPO, selling 3.8 million shares at $4 each, granting underwriters option for 570,000 more shares.
data.description: Based in Laguna Hills, California, Elite Express Holding Inc. (ETS), a company specializing in last-mile delivery services, revealed the completion of its recent initial public offering. The offering consisted of 3,800,000 shares of Class A common stock, with each share priced at $4.00, resulting in total gross proceeds of about $15.2 million. This amount excludes underwriting discounts and offering expenses. Furthermore, ETS has provided the underwriters with a 45-day option to obtain up to 570,000 additional shares of Class A common stock at the offering price.

data.title: SaferWatch secures Sourcewell contract, offering services to agencies across North America.841 characters
data.description: SaferWatch, a renowned provider of public safety and emergency response technology, is excited to share that it has been awarded a Sourcewell cooperative purchasing contract. This contract will allow agencies across North America access to SaferWatch's services. The announcement was made on Aug. 22, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its reach and impact, offering its innovative solutions to more organizations.
US Department of Interior Posts Order on Website

data.title: Sen. Sherrod Brown faces scrutiny over crypto campaign funds in his Senate comeback bid; a growing concern.
data.description: Former Banking Chair Sherrod Brown's Senate comeback bid in Ohio is being overshadowed by significant cryptocurrency campaign contributions. The sizable amount of crypto funding is causing concern as Brown seeks reelection.

data.title: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals granted non-statutory stock options to new employees outside the Long-Term Incentive Plan according to NASDAQ Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, based in Watertown, Massachusetts, shared on August 18, 2025, that they provided non-statutory stock options to new recruits as inducement awards. The company, listed as EYPT on Nasdaq, focuses on creating treatments for serious retinal ailments. This initiative was carried out outside of their 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan, following NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Inflation expected to stay above 2% target through 2021, economists say.
data.description: Many economists predict that inflation will continue to exceed the central bank's target of 2 percent for the remainder of the year.

data.title: Core CPI inflation surpasses 3%, not affecting Fed rate reductions; S&P 500 surges.
data.description: Despite a recent increase, the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate remains below the threshold that would prevent the Federal Reserve from implementing rate cuts. The core CPI inflation has surpassed 3%, but it is not significant enough to deter the Fed from its plans. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 saw an upward trend following this news.

data.title: Stock market mixed with Dow falling, Nasdaq rising. Buffett stock up. Trump teases Putin move. Solar stocks strong.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline while the Nasdaq saw a slight increase in numbers. There was a notable surge in a new equity associated with Warren Buffett in today's stock market. President Donald Trump alluded to a potential action involving Putin. Solar stocks displayed a strong performance. This update on the stock market includes live coverage and can be found on Investor's Business Daily's platform.

data.title: Asante Gold receives C$237M from equity offering, completes Kinross restructuring as part of $500M financing.
data.description: On August 12, 2025, Asante Gold Corporation based in Vancouver, British Columbia, provided an update on its recent financial activities. The company was able to meet the requirements for the initial drawdown under definitive agreements linked to a substantial $500 million financing package. This achievement also fulfilled the escrow release conditions tied to a bought deal private placement that involved 163,300,000 subscription receipts sold at C$1.45 each, generating total gross proceeds of around C$237 million. The private placement, known as the "Offering," was completed on July 7, 2025. It is noteworthy that all specified amounts are in U.S. dollars unless stated otherwise.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. to remarket $37.5 million in New York State Environmental Facilities Corporation Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds.
data.description: Today, in Rutland, Vermont, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. initiated the remarketing process for $37.5 million in New York State Environmental Facilities Corporation Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds. These bonds were originally issued on September 2, 2020, amounting to $40.0 million. Casella plans to redeem $2.5 million of the bonds on September 2, 2025, with the remaining $37.5 million to be remarketed on the same date. Casella is a company providing regional solid waste, recycling, and resource management services and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CWST.

data.title: Safe Bulkers sells MV Pedhoulas Merchant, a 2006-built dry-bulk vessel, for $11.5 million, with delivery in September 2025.
data.description: On August 12, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. revealed that they have finalized a deal to sell MV Pedhoulas Merchant, a Kamsarmax class dry-bulk vessel constructed in Japan in 2006. The sale price for the vessel is reported to be $11.5 million, with the delivery anticipated to take place in September 2025. Safe Bulkers, Inc., recognized as a global provider of marine drybulk transportation services, made the announcement regarding this agreement.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions is restructuring its Canadian subsidiary under CCAA, not affecting U.S. operations or filing for bankruptcy.
data.description: CCAA Proceedings will not impact U.S. operations, notably Halo subsidiary, and no U.S. bankruptcy filing is anticipated. The proceedings are expected to solely affect entities outside the U.S. The Halo subsidiary in the U.S. is forecasted to continue operating as usual with no hindrance from the CCAA Proceedings.

data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) welcomes EPA's decision granting over half of pending small refinery exemptions for 2019-2024. CEO lauds move for affordable energy and job creation.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee, has acknowledged the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's favorable move to approve over 50% of their outstanding small refinery exemptions for the duration of 2019-2024. Avigal Soreq, the CEO, expressed satisfaction, stating that these exemptions have resolved a longstanding concern and will support the company in maintaining reasonable energy costs and preserving well-paid employment opportunities in the central regions of the country. The Trump Administration has been appreciated for this decision.

data.title: Mississippi declares public health emergency as infant mortality rates rise, leading the country.
data.description: Yesterday, the Mississippi State Department of Health in Arlington, Va., announced a public health emergency due to a significant increase in infant mortality rates. This comes as the state was already noted for having the highest infant death rates in the country. The organization March of Dimes, a prominent leader in supporting maternal and infant health, is closely monitoring the situation. The alarming rise in infant mortality serves as a pressing concern, with the state witnessing a surge in reported cases, further emphasizing the urgent need for intervention and support to address this critical issue.

data.title: New US bill suggests modern privateers to combat cybercrime, targeting offenses like cryptocurrency theft and ransomware.
data.description: The proposed legislation outlined a range of specific crimes that could be targeted, such as the theft of digital currencies, instances of ransomware attacks, and fraudulent schemes involving the butchering of pigs.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. releases interim report on Share Buy-Back Programme transactions.
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has released an interim report detailing the transactions carried out as part of their Share Buy-Back Programme. The report provides an overview of the transactions conducted during the specified period, highlighting the total number of shares repurchased, the average purchase price, and the total investment made in the buy-back program. This information allows stakeholders to understand the bank's financial activity and its commitment to enhancing shareholder value through the repurchase of shares.

data.title: Apple and Google are reportedly discussing a Siri-Gemini iPhone deal, potentially boosting Google stock. Talks also include a Meta cloud computing agreement.
data.description: On Friday, the stock of Google experienced an increase as reports surfaced regarding discussions between Apple and Alphabet about a potential deal involving Siri for Gemini iPhone and a cloud computing agreement with Meta. Speculations are growing about the possibility of a significant agreement between Apple and Google, which has caused a surge in Google's stock. The talks highlight the potential impact of collaboration between major tech companies on the market. The news has attracted the attention of investors and industry analysts, with many closely monitoring the situation. The developments suggest a potentially game-changing partnership that could reshape the landscape of tech industry.

data.title: Trump Admin invests $8.9B in Intel as shareholder, struggling chip giant. Reported by Investors Business Daily.
data.description: Intel announced on Friday that the Trump Administration has invested $8.9 billion in the chip company, making them a shareholder. This move comes as Intel faces financial challenges, and it marks a significant development in their stakeholder structure.
